I want you to know that I am listening to these podcasts over and over and it is helping me to break addictions to MSNBC, CNN, BBC, and doom scrolling through youtube. I am also pulling up TMS as something to read instead of clickbait. I am using your stuff to brainwash myself into living out loud as an artist/musician... Right now I am doing a series of stretches prescribed by my chiropractor to straighten up my spine after 50 years of a defensive crouch. Perfect time to listen to MANC podcasts and get religion while I put in my reps...
